title.rendered: Aptio V UEFI Firmware Selected as Reference BIOS for Second Generation AMD EPYC Server Processors

content.rendered:
AMI is pleased to announce BIOS support for the second generation of the AMD EPYC™ server processor, as its Aptio® V UEFI firmware was selected as the shipping reference BIOS for the recently released AMD EPYC™ 7002 Series.

This announcement continues the tradition of AMI providing reference BIOS support for the AMD EPYC™ platform, as AMI was previously selected as the shipping reference BIOS provider for the original AMD EPYC™ 7000 Series server processors and platforms.

To read the press release in full, please visit: ami.com/aptio-v-uefi-firmware-from-ami-selected-as-reference-bios-for-second-generation-amd-epyc-server-processors/.
